description: Traffic Director is Google Cloud’s managed traffic control plane for service mesh and advanced traffic management. It distributes routing and policy configuration to Envoy and proxyless gRPC clients running in Google Cloud or connected environments.
summary: trafficdirector.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Traffic Director xDS control-plane endpoint authenticated with Google Cloud bearer tokens; no separate public REST/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface on this domain was found.
